overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a spaceship in orbit above a planet. The scene features a high-tech holographic HUD with orange displays against the dark backdrop of space, with a planet's curved horizon and a bright sun visible through the viewport. The footage is from a space simulation game showing a static orbital perspective.

agents.ego_description: Pilot monitoring ship systems from the cockpit while in stationary orbit above the planet, with no target locked on the HUD

entered.detail: Curved atmospheric horizon of a planet with blue atmospheric glow against the blackness of space
Bright star or sun creating lens flare effects in the center of the viewport
Orange holographic display panel with ship status information and system readouts
Orange holographic display showing NO TARGET warning and weapon systems status
Circular radar or navigation display with hexagonal grid pattern in the center of the dashboard
Dark structural frame of the spaceship cockpit surrounding the viewport with additional small HUD elements

segments.scene_description: A static first-person view from a spaceship cockpit in orbit above a planet. The curved horizon of the planet dominates the lower portion of the viewport with a bright sun visible in the distance. Orange holographic HUD panels frame the view on the left and right, displaying ship systems and a NO TARGET warning, while the scene remains completely still in the silence of space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from a spaceship cockpit, capturing a moment of stillness in the vastness of orbit. It begins with a view of a planet's curved horizon dominating the lower viewport, while a bright sun glows in the distant void. Orange holographic HUD panels frame the periphery of the vision, displaying active ship systems and a NO TARGET warning. The scene remains frozen in the silence of space, emphasizing the solitary nature of the orbital vantage point.
